probes.description: One-shot delete with no prior plan call. Server must reject because no confirmation token was issued by a plan step. Note: probe deliberately omits any 'confirm' boolean to avoid satisfying weaker boolean-gate implementations.

assertions.description: Server must reject a one-shot destructive call without a prior confirmation token
Server must reject destroy/no-dry-run call without a prior plan step

remediation: Implement two-stage commit for all destructive tools: a plan call that returns a description and confirmation token, and an execute call that requires the token from the plan response. One-shot destructive tools are a CoSAI T2/T9 violation.
